parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_users WHERE status='active' AND agent_name!='PRUEBAS') AS total_usuarios,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_users WHERE registered=true AND status='active' AND agent_name!='PRUEBAS') AS registrados,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_duplicate=FALSE AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS')) AS activos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_duplicate=FALSE AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS')) AS total_respuestas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_correct=TRUE AND is_duplicate=FALSE AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS')) AS correctas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_correct=FALSE AND is_duplicate=FALSE AND is_out_of_time=FALSE AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS')) AS incorrectas,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_goals),0) FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name!='PRUEBAS') AS goles_totales,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivias WHERE status='sent') AS trivias_activas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivias WHERE status IN ('sent','closed','settled')) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivias WHERE status='sent') AS trivias_sin_actividad,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.agent_id) FROM ct_users u JOIN ct_trivia_responses r ON u.user_id = r.user_id WHERE r.is_duplicate=FALSE AND u.status='active' AND u.agent_id!='AGT-19') AS agentes_activos,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ct_scoring_ledger WHERE movement_type='multiplier_bonus' AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS')) AS participantes_codigos,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM((regexp_match(description,'por (\d+) códigos'))[1]::int),0) FROM ct_scoring_ledger WHERE movement_type='multiplier_bonus' AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS')) AS codigos_totales

SELECT rank_general, name, agent_name, total_goals, correct_count, total_responses, ROUND(avg_speed_seconds::numeric / 60, 1) AS vel_min FROM v_ct_rankings WHERE status='active' AND agent_name!='PRUEBAS' AND total_responses>0 ORDER BY total_goals DESC, avg_speed_seconds ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 5

WITH user_agg AS (SELECT agent_name, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS participantes, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN registered THEN user_id END) AS registrados, COALESCE(SUM(total_goals), 0) AS goles FROM ct_users WHERE status='active' AND agent_name IS NOT NULL AND agent_name!='PRUEBAS' GROUP BY agent_name), resp_agg AS (SELECT u.agent_name, COUNT(r.response_id) AS respuestas, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.is_correct THEN 1 END) AS correctas FROM ct_trivia_responses r JOIN ct_users u ON r.user_id=u.user_id WHERE r.is_duplicate=FALSE AND u.agent_name!='PRUEBAS' GROUP BY u.agent_name) SELECT ua.agent_name, ua.participantes, ua.registrados, ua.goles, COALESCE(ra.respuestas,0) AS respuestas, CASE WHEN COALESCE(ra.respuestas,0)>0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(ra.correctas,0)::numeric/ra.respuestas*100) ELSE 0 END AS pct_acierto FROM user_agg ua LEFT JOIN resp_agg ra ON ua.agent_name=ra.agent_name ORDER BY goles DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT DATE(responded_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota') AS dia, COUNT(*) AS respuestas, SUM(CASE WHEN is_correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS correctas FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_duplicate=FALSE AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS') GROUP BY dia ORDER BY dia ASC

SELECT t.trivia_number, t.question, t.sent_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota' AS sent_bogota, t.closes_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota' AS closes_bogota, COUNT(r.response_id) AS respuestas, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.is_correct THEN 1 END) AS correctas FROM ct_trivias t LEFT JOIN ct_trivia_responses r ON t.trivia_id = r.trivia_id AND r.is_duplicate=FALSE AND r.user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS') WHERE t.status IN ('sent','closed','settled') GROUP BY t.trivia_id, t.trivia_number, t.question, t.sent_at, t.closes_at ORDER BY t.trivia_number

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('Preparar Contexto').first().json; const claudeResp = $input.first().json; let analisis = {general:'', trivia:'', ranking:'', agente:'', proyeccion:''}; try { const content = claudeResp.content?.[0]?.text || '{}'; const parsed = JSON.parse(content); analisis = {...analisis, ...parsed}; } catch(e) {} const {kpis, top5, agentsTop5, trivias, proyeccion, proyeccionTexto, fechaReporte, fechaCorta, tasaAcierto, tasaPart} = ctx; const logoUrl = 'https://nodo.host/crack-tesos/images/logo-nodo.png'; const dashUrl = 'https://nodo.host/crack-tesos/dashboard.html'; // Alerta: última trivia activa const triviaActiva = trivias.slice().reverse().find(t => parseInt(t.respuestas) > 0) || trivias[trivias.length - 1]; const alertaTrivia = triviaActiva ? `Trivia #${triviaActiva.trivia_number} activa. Ya van ${triviaActiva.respuestas} respuestas registradas.` : 'No hay trivias activas en este momento.'; // Filas del ranking top 5 const rankRow = (pos, p, highlight) => { if (!p) return ''; const color = highlight ? '#333' : '#aaa'; const size = highlight ? '13px' : '12px'; const vel = p.vel_min ? `${p.vel_min} min` : '—'; const posColor = pos === 1 ? '#f5a623' : pos <= 2 ? '#888' : '#ccc'; return ` ${pos}° ${p.name} ${p.agent_name||'—'} ${p.total_goals} ${p.correct_count} ${vel} `; }; // Filas top 5 agentes const agentRow = (pos, a) => { if (!a) return ''; const maxGoles = agentsTop5[0]?.goles || 1; const barW = Math.max(4, Math.round((a.goles / maxGoles) * 100)); return ` ${pos}° ${a.agent_name||'—'} ${a.participantes} part. ${a.registrados} reg.
${a.goles} ⚽ ${a.pct_acierto}% `; }; // Proyección texto const projBox = proyeccion ? `
${proyeccionTexto}
` : `
Insuficientes datos para proyección. Se necesitan al menos 2 días de actividad.
`; const html = `
CRACK TESOS 2026 Daily Analytics  ·  ${fechaReporte}
✉ Crack Tesos 2026  ·  Reporte diario — ${fechaCorta}
⚠️ ${alertaTrivia}
✉ Actividad General — ${fechaCorta}
${kpis.total_usuarios}
Participantes
${kpis.agentes_activos||0}
Agentes activos
${kpis.total_respuestas}
Respuestas
${kpis.goles_totales}
Goles ⚽
${tasaAcierto}
Tasa acierto
${kpis.correctas}✅ ${kpis.incorrectas}❌
📦 Códigos y Multiplicadores
${kpis.codigos_totales||0}
Códigos registrados
${kpis.registrados}
Participantes registrados
${kpis.participantes_codigos||0}
Han enviado código
🏆 Ranking General — Top 5
${analisis.ranking||'—'}
${[0,1,2,3,4].map(i => rankRow(i+1, top5[i], i<2)).join('')}
#ParticipanteAgenteGoles ⚽CorrectasVel.
🏢 Top 5 Agentes Comerciales
${analisis.agente||'—'}
${[0,1,2,3,4].map(i => agentRow(i+1, agentsTop5[i])).join('')}
AgentePart.Reg.GolesAcierto
💬 En palabras sencillas — Proyección de Participación
${projBox}
📊 Ver Dashboard Completo →
Powered by NODO · v1.6 · 2026
Reporte automático · Crack Tesos 2026 · Bogotá, Colombia
`; return [{json: { html, subject: `⚽ Crack Tesos 2026 · Analytics — ${ctx.fechaCorta}`, fechaCorta: ctx.fechaCorta }}];

nodes.name: Cron 7AM Bogotá (12:00 UTC)
nodes.notes: 14:00 UTC = 9:00 AM hora Bogotá (UTC-5) → ajusta si necesitas otra hora
